/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/libkviolet.a CMakeFiles/kviolet_static.dir/actor/active.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kviolet_static.dir/actor/actorface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kviolet_static.dir/actor/event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kviolet_static.dir/actor/statemachine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kviolet_static.dir/efficient/annularcache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kviolet_static.dir/efficient/instwlinklist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kviolet_static.dir/efficient/twlinklist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kviolet_static.dir/logger/file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kviolet_static.dir/utilities/filesystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kviolet_static.dir/utilities/math.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kviolet_static.dir/utilities/net.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kviolet_static.dir/utilities/string.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kviolet_static.dir/utilities/time.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/libkviolet.a
